text:
is a manga anthology series based on the Neon Genesis Evangelion anime series. It is compiled into a three volume and it was published by Hobby Japan Comics from July 1996 to November 1996.

Trivia

The first volume is part of the Amusement Anthology Series 23.
The second volume is part of the Amusement Anthology Series 25.
The third volume is part of the Amusement Anthology Series 26.
